# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-06-16

Anthropic published official docs for Apple Foundation Models integration with Claude, enabling hybrid cloud and on-device AI on Apple platforms.

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Apple Foundation Models — Claude integration documentation
   Major platform integration between Claude and Apple's on-device models. Directly relevant to anyone building AI tools on Mac/iOS, including MCP/agent workflows.

2. Why AI hasn't replaced software engineers, and won't
   Credible, data-backed analysis from respected researchers that counters common AI anxiety narrative with real numbers.

3. Curl will not accept vulnerability reports during July 2026
   Curl is ubiquitous infrastructure. A month-long vulnerability reporting freeze is unusual and worth knowing about for anyone who depends on curl.

4. The only scalable delete in Postgres is DROP TABLE
   Practical, well-explained guidance for a common Postgres scaling issue. Directly relevant to anyone running Postgres with growing tables.

5. Show HN: Kage — Shadow any website to a single binary for offline viewing
   Practical open-source tool with clear use case for documentation archival and offline access.

Full brief with all 40 researched links → https://thenightlylibrarian.com/briefs/2026-06-16
